column1: # HoopsValue — manual position overrides.  NBA 2K26 is the base source
# (data/player_positions_2k.csv); anything you put here WINS over it.
# To correct a player: add a row below the header  ->  name
#   positions = slash-separated from PG / SG / SF / PF / C
#   - Name should match the player (accents optional; "luka doncic" is fine).
#   - A single position means EXACTLY that (no auto flex) — use it to pin a
#     player to one spot (e.g. a pure PG who 2K also tags at SG).
#   - Lines starting with # are ignored. Leave the file header-only to use 2K as-is.
